prompt: A photorealistic satirical editorial photo on an airport tarmac under a bright partly cloudy sky, showing a white private jet parked at an angle with its door open and stairs down. On the side of the jet, large clean corporate lettering reads “Google | ANTHROPIC”. In the foreground, 2 adult male tech-executive figures in dark business suits stand close together in a congratulatory embrace, facing camera, with one of them holding a thick fan of U.S. dollar bills in his hand. Their faces are intentionally obscured with smooth rectangular blur blocks. In the midground and right side, 2 more adult male figures in dark suits, also with blurred faces, push 2 airport luggage carts stacked high with tightly bundled bricks of U.S. cash. The left cart has a black panel with the Google logo, and the right cart has a black panel reading “Deep Pockets Division”. The wet ground reflects the figures, carts, and plane, adding a glossy post-rain look. Composition is centered and slightly low-angle, with the hugging pair dominating the frame and the two cash carts clearly visible behind them. Tone is sharp, realistic, high-detail, corporate-political satire, newswire photography style, natural daylight, crisp focus, subtle depth of field, premium private aviation aesthetics.
translatedPrompt: 一张在明亮多云天空下、机场停机坪上的写实讽刺社论照片。画面中，一架白色私人飞机斜向停放，舱门开启，舷梯放下。机身上印有醒目整洁的企业字样“Google | ANTHROPIC”。前景中，两名身着深色商务西装的成年男性科技高管紧紧拥抱，面向镜头，其中一人手中拿着一叠厚厚的美元钞票。他们的面部被刻意用平滑的矩形模糊块遮挡。中景和右侧，另外两名同样面部模糊、身着深色西装的成年男性，正推着两辆堆满紧密捆扎的美元砖块的机场行李推车。左侧推车上有一个带有 Google 标志的黑色面板，右侧推车上的黑色面板写着“Deep Pockets Division”。潮湿的地面反射出人物、推车和飞机的倒影，增添了雨后光泽感。构图居中且略带低角度，拥抱的两人占据画面主体，身后的两辆现金推车清晰可见。整体基调犀利、写实、细节丰富，具有企业政治讽刺意味，呈现新闻摄影风格，自然日光，焦点清晰，景深微妙，展现高端私人航空美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 讽刺科技圈金钱喷气机照片：此提示词可生成一张写实风格的社论式讽刺图片，描绘科技高管、品牌私人飞机以及满载现金的推车，用于评论 AI 融资与企业权力。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
